Function: Provide correct fiber orientation per laminate schedule
Failure_Mode: Ply misalignment (>±2°)
Effect: Reduced structural stiffness and strength — potential delamination under load
Cause: Operator error during manual layup — poor template visibility
Current_Control: Layup template + visual inspection after each ply

Function: Maintain correct ply count per laminate schedule
Failure_Mode: Wrong ply count (under or over)
Effect: Laminate thickness deviation — non-compliance with drawing — part rejection
Cause: Operator counting error — no automated ply tracking
Current_Control: Build book sign-off per ply

Function: Maintain cold chain integrity prior to layup
Failure_Mode: Out-of-life prepreg used (exceeded out-time)
Effect: Inadequate cure — voids — reduced interlaminar shear strength
Cause: Material out-time tracking failure — label not updated
Current_Control: Material control log + out-time tracking sheet

Function: Allow clean release of part from tool
Failure_Mode: Release film omitted on tool surface
Effect: Part bonded permanently to tool — tool and part scrapped
Cause: Operator oversight during tool prep step
Current_Control: Pre-layup checklist — tool inspection sign-off

Function: Maintain vacuum integrity throughout cure cycle
Failure_Mode: Bag rupture during autoclave cure
Effect: Part exposed to atmosphere — resin bleed-out — void formation
Cause: Sharp prepreg edges puncture bag — inadequate sealant tape coverage
Current_Control: Visual inspection of bag prior to autoclave loading

Function: Seal vacuum bag perimeter to tool flange
Failure_Mode: Sealant tape bridging — loss of seal
Effect: Vacuum leak — uneven compaction — porosity in cured laminate
Cause: Tape not pressed firmly into tool radius — cold shop temperature
Current_Control: Vacuum hold test (>25 inHg for 5 min before cure)

Function: Allow resin bleed and air evacuation during cure
Failure_Mode: Breather cloth blocked by bridging bag
Effect: Resin starvation — dry spots — porosity in surface ply
Cause: Insufficient breather coverage over complex contours
Current_Control: Visual inspection during bagging layup

Function: Maintain cure temperature profile per specification
Failure_Mode: Temperature overshoot during cure ramp
Effect: Resin over-cure — matrix microcracking — reduced toughness
Cause: Controller PID tuning drift — thermocouple calibration error
Current_Control: Autoclave data logger + post-cure review

Function: Maintain cure pressure profile per specification
Failure_Mode: Pressure loss mid-cycle
Effect: Under-compaction — voids — porosity — thickness non-conformance
Cause: Pressure line fitting leak — valve failure
Current_Control: Pressure data logger — in-cycle alarm at ±5 psi deviation

Function: Provide accurate part temperature measurement during cure
Failure_Mode: Thermocouple detachment during pressurization
Effect: Undetected temperature excursion — invalid cure record — part quarantine
Cause: Thermocouple adhesive failure under autoclave pressure
Current_Control: Post-cure thermocouple continuity check

Function: Transfer cured part from tool without damage
Failure_Mode: Part sticks to tool — forced extraction required
Effect: Part edge damage — surface delamination — part rejection
Cause: Inadequate release agent application — release film failure
Current_Control: Release agent application log — pre-cure inspection

Function: Maintain structural integrity during demolding
Failure_Mode: Delamination at ply drop during prying
Effect: Internal delamination — non-visible damage — part passes visual but fails NDI
Cause: Excessive prying force applied at wrong location — operator inexperience
Current_Control: NDI (ultrasonic C-scan) after demolding

Function: Detect subsurface voids and delaminations in cured laminate
Failure_Mode: Scanner calibration drift — missed defect
Effect: Defective part released to service — in-service structural failure risk
Cause: Reference standard not checked before scan — equipment wear
Current_Control: Pre-scan calibration on reference block per ASTM E2375

Function: Record and disposition all NDI findings per drawing
Failure_Mode: NDI finding not dispositioned — part shipped with open discrepancy
Effect: Non-conforming part in service — regulatory non-compliance — liability
Cause: Paperwork oversight — no electronic routing enforcement
Current_Control: Quality review gate — inspector sign-off required before ship

Function: Drill fastener holes to drawing tolerance (±0.002 in)
Failure_Mode: Hole oversize due to worn drill bit
Effect: Fastener installation failure — joint strength reduction — rework or rejection
Cause: Drill bit not replaced per tool life schedule — no force feedback
Current_Control: Hole diameter inspection per sampling plan (CMM or go/no-go gauge)

Function: Cut panel perimeter to drawing dimensions
Failure_Mode: Router bit deflection causing overcut
Effect: Dimensional non-compliance — part rejection — costly rework
Cause: Incorrect feed rate or worn bit — no in-process force monitoring
Current_Control: First-article CMM inspection after trim

Function: Locate and clamp part during router trim operations
Failure_Mode: Part shift during routing due to inadequate clamping
Effect: Edge delamination — dimensional variation — part rejection
Cause: Insufficient clamping force — fixture wear at datum contacts
Current_Control: Clamp torque verification per setup sheet before machining

Function: Provide adhesion-ready surface for primer application
Failure_Mode: Peel ply not removed prior to prime coat
Effect: Paint adhesion failure — coating delamination in service — part rework
Cause: Operator oversight — no peel ply removal step on traveler
Current_Control: Pre-prime surface inspection checklist — supervisor sign-off

Function: Apply corrosion-resistant primer to bonding surfaces
Failure_Mode: Dry spray or insufficient primer coverage
Effect: Corrosion initiation at bare substrate — reduced service life
Cause: Low spray pressure — incorrect gun standoff distance — cold shop
Current_Control: Wet film thickness gauge check after prime application

Function: Maintain contamination-free bonding surface before adhesive
Failure_Mode: Surface contamination (oil or grease or moisture) prior to bonding
Effect: Bond line failure — adhesive joint porosity — structural failure risk
Cause: Inadequate solvent wipe — handling without nitrile gloves
Current_Control: Contact angle test and water-break test before bond

Function: Apply adhesive film at correct weight per unit area
Failure_Mode: Incorrect adhesive film thickness or coverage gaps
Effect: Inadequate bond strength — joint failure under design load
Cause: Film cut too thin — wrinkles reducing coverage — cold film storage
Current_Control: Film areal weight verification before layup onto bond surface

Function: Align mating parts to drawing dimensions during bond cure
Failure_Mode: Misalignment of bonded sub-assembly beyond tolerance
Effect: Geometric non-conformance — assembly rejected — costly rework
Cause: Jig datum wear — insufficient clamp contact force on locating pins
Current_Control: CMM dimensional check of bonded assembly after cure

Function: Achieve full cure of structural adhesive per bond cycle spec
Failure_Mode: Adhesive under-cure due to cold bond tool surface
Effect: Reduced bond strength — joint failure under service load — safety risk
Cause: Bond tool heater element failure — incorrect cure cycle set-up
Current_Control: Bond tool thermocouple data log review after every cure cycle

Function: Verify part geometry against drawing GD&T requirements
Failure_Mode: CMM stylus calibration drift — dimensional acceptance error
Effect: Non-conforming part accepted and shipped — customer escape
Cause: Calibration artifact check skipped — stylus tip wear undetected
Current_Control: Daily calibration artifact check per AS9100 Rev D

Function: Review all in-process records and traveler for completeness
Failure_Mode: Incomplete traveler — missing required sign-offs
Effect: Non-conforming part released without proper documentation — liability
Cause: Time pressure — unclear traveler routing — poor process discipline
Current_Control: Quality gate review by QA before ship authorization

Function: Install fasteners to specified torque values per drawing
Failure_Mode: Under-torque on critical structural fasteners
Effect: Joint loosening in service — fatigue crack initiation — safety hazard
Cause: Torque wrench calibration expired — incorrect operator technique
Current_Control: Calibration log check — torque stripe applied after installation

Function: Protect cured panel surfaces during transport to customer
Failure_Mode: Insufficient foam packaging for non-standard panel geometry
Effect: Edge chipping — surface damage — part rejected at customer receiving
Cause: Non-standard part dimensions not communicated to packaging
Current_Control: Packaging inspection sign-off before crate closure

Function: Maintain part orientation and prevent point loading in transit
Failure_Mode: Part shifts in crate — localized point load on panel surface
Effect: Surface delamination at load point — part damaged on delivery
Cause: Inadequate blocking and bracing — rough carrier handling
Current_Control: Shipping damage inspection on receipt at customer facility

Function: Record all inspection results with correct part traceability
Failure_Mode: Incorrect data entry in ERP — wrong part number or serial number
Effect: Traceability failure — potential part mix-up — regulatory non-compliance
Cause: Manual data entry error — no barcode scanning enforced
Current_Control: Record review by QA before traveler closure

Function: Verify raw material traceability to approved qualified source
Failure_Mode: Material certification missing or does not match material received
Effect: Non-traceable material used — regulatory violation — part quarantine
Cause: Certification not verified at incoming inspection — time pressure
Current_Control: Incoming inspection verification checklist per quality plan
